column1: # ANALYST OVERRIDE LOG (append only) — see docs/override-layer-design.md
# Overrides are annotations: they NEVER change the model score or decile. They
# are displayed next to it and scored quarterly (Validation tab scoreboard).
#   date        YYYY-MM-DD the override was filed
#   analyst     who filed it (attribution is non-negotiable)

column2: more_risky   (which way you disagree with the model)

column1: #   factor      optional: the specific factor being disputed (e.g. accruals_ocf_ni)
